ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date when the race took place */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the race is held */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Total number of laps in the race */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit where the race is held */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "race_winner" TEXT /* Name of the race winner */,
  "race_winner_team" TEXT /* Name of the race winner's team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifying" (
  "qualify_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualifying result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position achieved in qualifying */,
  "time" TEXT /* Qualifying lap time */,
  "q1_time" TEXT /* Q1 lap time */,
  "q2_time" TEXT /* Q2 lap time */,
  "q3_time" TEXT /* Q3 lap time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualify_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the driver belongs to */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "driver_number" INTEGER /* Driver number */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Team principal */,
  "chassis" TEXT /* Chassis manufacturer */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine manufacturer */,
  "base_location" TEXT /* Base location of the team */,
  "team_chief" TEXT /* Team chief */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laps" (
  "lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Lap time */,
  "pit_stop" INTEGER /* Indicates if a pit stop occurred during this lap */,
  "tyre_compound" TEXT /* Tyre compound used */,
  "sector1_time" TEXT /* Sector 1 time */,
  "sector2_time" TEXT /* Sector 2 time */,
  "sector3_time" TEXT /* Sector 3 time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laps_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laps_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fastest_laps" (
  "fastest_lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fastest lap */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number of the fastest lap */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Time of the fastest lap */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the fastest lap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fastest_lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fastest_laps_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fastest_laps_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_of_the_day" (
  "dotd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the driver of the day */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who was driver of the day */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for being chosen as driver of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dotd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_of_the_day_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_of_the_day_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the points entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the race */,
  "points_reason" TEXT /* Reason for earning points (e.g., finishing position, fastest lap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "number_of_races" INTEGER /* Total number of races in the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the season champion */,
  "champion_team" TEXT /* Name of the season champion's team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the circuit */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the circuit in kilometers */,
  "turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the circuit */,
  "lap_record" TEXT /* Lap record time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the sponsorship started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the sponsorship ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver involved in the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., crash, technical failure) */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "broadcast_channel" TEXT /* Channel broadcasting the race */,
  "broadcast_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the broadcast */,
  "broadcast_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the broadcast */,
  "commentators" TEXT /* Commentators for the broadcast */,
  "viewers" INTEGER /* Number of viewers for the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from ticket sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket type */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fan attended the race */,
  "favourite_driver" TEXT /* Favourite driver of the fan */,
  "favourite_team" TEXT /* Favourite team of the fan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchandise" (
  "merchandise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchandise item */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchandise item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of items sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from merchandise sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchandise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchandise_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather data */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the race */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity during the race */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the race */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the race */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_suppliers" (
  "engine_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine supplier */,
  "engine_supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine supplier */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine supplied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tyre_suppliers" (
  "tyre_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tyre supplier */,
  "tyre_supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the tyre supplier */,
  "tyre_type" TEXT /* Type of tyre supplied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tyre_supplier_id")
)
